events.label: reasoning
events.text: We need answer JSON only. Need decide pass/fail. Scenario: EMT bending & installation, observed field condition: >360° of bends between pull points. Work rough-complete. Reference NEC Art. 358, Ch. 9 fill. Need determine compliance. NEC Article 358 (EMT) includes 358.26: Bends - Total bends between pull points shall not exceed 360 degrees. So >360° is non-compliant. Decision fail. Risk? Non-compliant conduit bending can cause wire pulling difficulty, insulation damage, maybe medium/high. For commercial project, code violation; risk medium? Could be high if it causes wire damage or inspection failure. But typical code violation: medium. Need component_conditions: installed-defective, non-compliant. percent_complete rough-complete maybe 80? value 0 (not asked numeric). sound_source etc default empty string/0. order empty, workable empty. findings: "More than 360° of bends between pull points." actions: "Install additional pull point/junction box or reroute conduit so total bends do not exceed 360° between pull points." rationale: NEC 358.26 limits total bends to 360° between pull points; observed exceeds limit, non-compliant. references: NEC Article 358.26, maybe Ch. 9 fill not relevant. Need valid JSON. Ensure no prose outside.
